title: BSNC Promotes Jenna Krohn to Associate General Counsel & Chief Compliance Officer
summary: BSNC is pleased to announce the promotion of shareholder Jenna Krohn to Associate General Counsel & Chief Compliance Officer (CCO). In this role, Krohn will lead compliance strategy for BSNC and its subsidiaries to manage and mitigate legal and regulatory risk across all business lines. As CCO, she...

title: Spring Bear Awareness
summary: Bears are waking from hibernation – tracks have been spotted. As we welcome the arrival of spring, it’s essential to be mindful of the bears awakening from their winter slumber. title: Russia’s Reaction to the US Continental Shelf Announcement: Political Posturing or Setting the Stage for a Big Move?

title: Election Officials Approve Recall Petition Applications for School Board Members Deedie Sorensen and Emil Mackey
